# MuleSoft Cloud Information Model

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (2.0) of Cloud Information Model documentation.
> See [Cloud Information Model llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/accelerators-cim/llms-full.txt) for all the Cloud Information Model documentation in one file.
